title: Wax Stamps & Seals
description: With Wax stamps and seals for every color! 40k style!
body:
Ever wanted to build with Warhammer style Purity seals?

This mod adds Stamps, Seals, Large Stamps, and Large Seals, in all 16 colors plus one uncolored variant!

Wax stamps and seals can serve as colorful decoration or to appease your machine spirits!

Credit to MFNMinerdz for the dye procedure!
